title: browserbase.com
summary:
Here are the most important distinct new features, integrations, and announcements from AI agent infrastructure vendors over the last 14 days, with a focus on protocol and bot-identity features:

### Browserbase Introduces Web Bot Auth for Verified Agent Identity

Browserbase has launched "Web Bot Auth," a new cryptographic identity layer for AI agents. This protocol enables agents to present a verifiable signature when browsing the web, allowing websites and anti-bot systems to distinguish legitimate agents from malicious bots. This initiative aims to reduce friction and blocks for trusted AI
